side_inputs_to_mirror.note: json camera/object metadata is mandatory for preview rendering and reprojection; do not skip.

transform_recipe.recipe_source: video-vs-preview check using the local original non-texture video plus JSON camera metadata
transform_recipe.note: Recipe is anchored to the MeshMamba Blender render script and JSON: origin is moved to bbox center before scaling, camera z-offset is 0.7, start yaw is 0, and scale/FOV come from JSON. A static OBJ import-axis correction is supported in code but is not yet validated as a dataset-wide default. Other models still need preview validation before full run.

pilot_models_note: 5-10 geometry-diverse models; exact list TBD after preview validation.

methods_in_this_repo.name: screen_space_gaussian (MeshMamba-adapted)
methods_in_this_repo.note: Adapter to face-level output not yet in this repo; currently external.

methods_in_this_repo.name: cone_projection_on_mesh (MeshMamba-adapted)
methods_in_this_repo.note: Adapter to face-level output not yet in this repo; currently external.

metrics.note: Collect full set first; filter at analysis stage.

benchmark_validity_rules: GT is per-face. Do not use vertex-level predictions directly against face-level GT.
MeshMamba non_texture and rgb_texture are separate sub-tracks.
Preview validation (one rendered frame per model) is a gate before full metric run.
